prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "1. Business" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Find where Item 1 ends: right before the "Item 1A" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 1 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Legal Proceedings
From time to time, we may be involved in various claims and legal proceedings arising in the ordinary course of business. None of our Company or
our subsidiaries is currently a party to any such claims or proceedings which, if decided adversely to the Company, would either individually or in
the aggregate, have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations or cash flows.
